## Suggested Entry

<!-- Paste the entry exactly as it should appear in the README -->

```markdown
- **[Tool Name](URL)**: Description.
```

## Verification

- [ ] URL returns HTTP 200 (the website loads)
- [ ] Tool is AI-powered
- [ ] Not already listed in the README
- [ ] Description is ≤120 characters and ends with a period
- [ ] URL has no UTM, referral, or tracking parameters
